name: property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, inconsistent tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated formatting instead of manual spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem_solved: Inconsistent tracking of lease payment statuses
features: manual entry for lease payment statuses
email notifications for payment due dates
